title: OutcomeContract
description: BOS5 outcome label, measure, reward, and guardrail contract (BOS-DATA-03, BOS-DATA-04). Sibling to contracts/events.schema.json; mirrors its discriminated-union pattern ($defs + discriminator.mapping + oneOf). v: 1. Defines: (1) a bitemporal, no-leakage outcome-event envelope shared by every categorical label and measure record; (2) the 7 categorical label variants discriminated on label_type; (3) the continuous measure family discriminated on measure_type (cycle_time now, additive later); (4) the RewardRecord (computed/derived, append-only, MAY carry decision_id); (5) the versioned team-level WeightSetRecord (per decision_type); (6) the GuardrailMetricSpec (tension-pair counter-metric, hard_gate|dashboard). Outcome labels NEVER carry decision_id/recommended_action (no-leakage, BOS4 D-04 carried); outcome labels join to decisions later by entity_id + as-of. RewardRecord is the only record family here that carries decision_id, because a reward is computed FOR a decision after the fact.
$comment: schema_version=1; additive changes (new label_type filling a reserved slot, new measure_type, new reward objective via a new weight-set version, new horizon name, new scalarization name) do NOT bump this version; breaking changes (altering an existing enum value, removing a required field, renaming a discriminator) increment the version and require a migration note in docs/BOS5-OUTCOME-REWARD-SPEC.md.

categorical_label.title: CategoricalLabel
categorical_label.description: Categorical outcome label event. Discriminated union over label_type (D-04 closed enum, 7 variants). Each variant composes the OutcomeEnvelope (bitemporal + no-leakage). Append-only over the entity lifecycle (D-05); may carry supersedes_outcome_id to point at an earlier label it revises (D-02).

outcome_measure.title: OutcomeMeasure
outcome_measure.description: Continuous outcome measure event. Discriminated union over measure_type. cycle_time now; additional measure_type variants are additive (no version bump). Each variant composes the OutcomeEnvelope.

OutcomeEnvelope.title: OutcomeEnvelope
OutcomeEnvelope.description: Shared envelope composed by EVERY categorical label and measure record. Bitemporal (event_time valid time + ingest_time transaction time, ingest_time >= event_time) per BOS3 D-02. Carries the BOS3 entity anchor (entity_id + entity_type) per D-03, the trace_id, the obs_window_id (named observation window per D-02, referenced not hard-coded per Pitfall 4), and source_rule (the D-01 derivation rule id that produced this outcome). supersedes_outcome_id is OPTIONAL (D-02/D-05 supersession pointer). NO decision reference and NO recommended_action field here: outcome labels never reference the BOS4 decision record; the join runs decision -> outcome by entity_id + as-of (BOS4 D-04 no-leakage guard carried).

outcome_id.title: Outcome Id
outcome_id.description: Stable unique id for this outcome event.

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: BOS3 stable entity id (task / PR / session / correlation id) the outcome is observed on. Labels anchor to the entity (D-03); decisions join via entity refs + as-of.

entity_type.title: Entity Type
entity_type.description: Kind of BOS3 entity this outcome anchors to. external_reserved is a forward-compat slot filled by BOS12 ingestion of external sources (review / CI / deploy / incident).

trace_id.title: Trace Id
trace_id.description: BOS3 root correlation / trace id linking this outcome to the originating work.

event_time.title: Event Time
event_time.description: When the outcome occurred in the world (valid time).

ingest_time.title: Ingest Time
ingest_time.description: When BOS recorded this outcome (transaction time). Always >= event_time. The as-of no-leakage join filters outcome events by ingest_time <= T_decision when reconstructing decision-time state (BOS4 D-04).

obs_window_id.title: Obs Window Id
obs_window_id.description: Identifies the named observation window definition that governs this label (D-02). The window length lives in a config table in the rationale spec, NOT as a schema constant (Pitfall 4); window tuning is a config change, not a schema version bump.

source_rule.title: Source Rule
source_rule.description: The D-01 derivation rule id that produced this outcome event. Deterministic, auditable, replayable.

supersedes_outcome_id.title: Supersedes Outcome Id
supersedes_outcome_id.description: OPTIONAL (D-02/D-05). Points to the outcome_id of an earlier label event on the same entity that this outcome revises (e.g. clean_merge superseded by escaped_defect). Absent on first-time labels. Append-only: the earlier record is never mutated; consumers reconstruct the maturation chain by ordering events by ingest_time.

CleanMergeLabel.title: CleanMergeLabel
CleanMergeLabel.description: label_type: clean_merge. A merged PR/commit that has not generated rework, revert, escaped defect, or incident within the observation window. The default positive outcome. Provisional; may be superseded by a later label (D-02). No severity field (D-06).

ReworkLabel.title: ReworkLabel
ReworkLabel.description: label_type: rework. Work on the same entity required because earlier work was insufficient (follow-up PR on same files within the observation window). OPTIONAL severity (D-06): low|medium|high — magnitude matters here.

severity.title: Severity
severity.description: OPTIONAL (D-06). Graded magnitude: low | medium | high.

RevertLabel.title: RevertLabel
RevertLabel.description: label_type: revert. A commit/PR that explicitly reverts a previous merge. Strong negative signal; presence alone is significant. No severity field (D-06).

FailedValidationLabel.title: FailedValidationLabel
FailedValidationLabel.description: label_type: failed_validation. CI/validation run triggered by the entity's changes that did not pass; caught before merge. No severity field (D-06). May occur multiple times on the same entity (CI flap vs real failure) — each failure is a separate append-only label event (D-05).

EscapedDefectLabel.title: EscapedDefectLabel
EscapedDefectLabel.description: label_type: escaped_defect. A defect not caught by validation/CI that reached production or was found by users/monitors after merge. Most delayed label — drives the long-horizon reward recomputation (D-09). OPTIONAL severity (D-06): low|medium|high.

severity.title: Severity
severity.description: OPTIONAL (D-06). Graded magnitude: low | medium | high.

IncidentLabel.title: IncidentLabel
IncidentLabel.description: label_type: incident. A production incident attributed to the entity's changes (broader than escaped_defect — may include deploy failures, performance degradation). Highest negative signal; a high-severity incident should dominate scalar reward regardless of weights. OPTIONAL severity (D-06): low|medium|high.

severity.title: Severity
severity.description: OPTIONAL (D-06). Graded magnitude: low | medium | high.

HumanOverrideLabel.title: HumanOverrideLabel
HumanOverrideLabel.description: label_type: human_override. A human explicitly overrode a system recommendation for this entity (BOS4 D-05/D-06 human_verdict = override). Unique to AI-assisted workflow context; captures divergence between recommended and actual action (override-as-signal). No severity field (D-06 / A9).

CycleTimeMeasure.title: CycleTimeMeasure
CycleTimeMeasure.description: measure_type: cycle_time. Time from task/story creation to merge/done, in seconds (float). Definition is pinned by measure_definition_id (Pitfall 1): the rationale spec fixes the definition to task.created_at -> pr.merged_at (the widest measure, consistent with DORA Lead Time for Changes decomposition). Point-in-time measurement; no observation window needed (measured at completion).

measure_definition_id.title: Measure Definition Id
measure_definition_id.description: Pins the named definition this measurement uses (Pitfall 1): references the task.created_at -> pr.merged_at definition in the rationale spec. Makes the measurement reproducible.

RewardRecord.title: RewardRecord
RewardRecord.description: Computed/derived reward record (NOT an outcome event — Pitfall 3). Append-only: when a later outcome arrives for the same decision, a NEW RewardRecord is appended with the same decision_id, higher ingest_time, and (typically) a longer horizon; the original is never mutated (D-09). MAY carry decision_id (reward is computed FOR a decision after the fact); this is the ONLY record family in this schema that carries decision_id. Point-in-time-correct reward: to reconstruct the reward available at policy-evaluation time T, select RewardRecord entries with ingest_time <= T.

reward_id.title: Reward Id
reward_id.description: Stable unique id for this reward record.

decision_id.title: Decision Id
decision_id.description: The BOS4 decision record id this reward is computed for. Joined after the fact (BOS4 D-04).

objective_vector.title: Objective Vector
objective_vector.description: Multi-objective vector (D-07): objective-name -> numeric value. Together with weight_set_version this fully determines the scalarized reward (reproducibility, D-08). Recommended objective keys: throughput, quality, rework_cost, flow.

weight_set_version.title: Weight Set Version
weight_set_version.description: The versioned team-level weight-set this reward was scalarized against (D-08). Reproducibility: (objective_vector + weight_set_version) => scalarized_reward.

horizon.title: Horizon
horizon.description: The reward horizon (D-09): short = provisional reward soon after merge (captures fast feedback); long = full reward including escaped defects and incidents. Additional horizon names are additive (no version bump).

computed_at.title: Computed At
computed_at.description: When the reward computation was performed.

ingest_time.title: Ingest Time
ingest_time.description: When this reward record was appended (transaction time). Used for as-of reward reconstruction: select entries with ingest_time <= T to get the reward available at time T.

scalarized_reward.title: Scalarized Reward
scalarized_reward.description: OPTIONAL. The scalar reward produced by applying the named scalarization (WeightSetRecord.scalarization) with the weight_set_version weights to the objective_vector. Absent when only the raw vector is recorded.

WeightSetRecord.title: WeightSetRecord
WeightSetRecord.description: Versioned team-level scalarization weight config, per decision_type (D-08). Team-level (no individual ranking per PROJECT.md §Trust). Versioned alongside policy versions; may differ per decision_type (task_to_agent weights != review_depth weights). Every reward is reproducible from (objective_vector + weight_set_version). Credit weighting across the many decisions a single outcome touches (D-03) is expressed here. BOS5 defines the SHAPE only; concrete weight values are team config set per team and refined in BOS13/14/15.

weight_set_id.title: Weight Set Id
weight_set_id.description: Stable id for this weight set.

weight_set_version.title: Weight Set Version
weight_set_version.description: Version string referenced by RewardRecord.weight_set_version. Reward reproducibility keys off this.

decision_type.title: Decision Type
decision_type.description: The BOS4 decision_type this weight set applies to (D-08 per-type weights). One of task_to_agent, autonomy_band, review_depth, validation_depth, escalation, no_action (BOS4 D-02).

objectives.title: Objectives
objectives.description: objective-name -> numeric weight (D-07/D-08). Recommended objective keys (D-07 discretion): throughput, quality, rework_cost, flow. BOS5 locks the shape, not the values.

scalarization.title: Scalarization
scalarization.description: Named scalarization function (D-07). linear_weighted is the initial interpretable baseline (R = sum(w_i * o_i)). chebyshev and epsilon_constrained are reserved valid future values (additive, no version bump); a migration note is added when one is first wired in the rationale spec.

effective_from.title: Effective From
effective_from.description: When this weight set version became effective.

GuardrailMetricSpec.title: GuardrailMetricSpec
GuardrailMetricSpec.description: Anti-Goodhart tension-pair counter-metric spec (D-10/D-11). Config/spec record, NOT a runtime event. Every reward objective MUST appear as linked_reward_objective on >=1 GuardrailMetricSpec (coverage rule, ACC-05). role classifies each guardrail as hard_gate (a breach blocks autonomy increase / policy promotion in BOS15) or dashboard (surfaced to BOS6 BOS-GOV-04, no auto-block). BOS5 defines metric + threshold shape + role; BOS15 wires the actual gate. Threshold VALUES are tunable team config (shape fixed by contract, values set in BOS15).

guardrail_id.title: Guardrail Id
guardrail_id.description: Stable id for this guardrail metric spec.

counter_metric_formula.title: Counter Metric Formula
counter_metric_formula.description: The named counter-metric formula in tension with the linked reward objective (D-10). E.g. rework_count / merge_count in a rolling window. Auditable string, not a lambda.

linked_reward_objective.title: Linked Reward Objective
linked_reward_objective.description: The reward objective name this counter-metric is in tension with. MUST match a key in WeightSetRecord.objectives for some weight set. Coverage rule (ACC-05): every objective named in WeightSetRecord.objectives appears as linked_reward_objective on >=1 GuardrailMetricSpec.

role.title: Role
role.description: EXACTLY hard_gate or dashboard (D-11). hard_gate: breach blocks autonomy increase / policy promotion (BOS15 wires the gate). dashboard: surfaced to BOS6 BOS-GOV-04 governance dashboard, no auto-block. No other values.

threshold_shape.title: Threshold Shape
threshold_shape.description: Shape of the breach threshold. type names the threshold kind (e.g. rate, count, ratio). window_days is the rolling window in days. max_value is the threshold ceiling (number) or null (team-configured; the shape is fixed by the contract, the value is set in BOS15).

type.title: Type
type.description: Threshold kind, e.g. rate, count, ratio.

window_days.title: Window Days
window_days.description: Rolling window length in days over which the counter-metric is evaluated.

max_value.title: Max Value
max_value.description: Threshold ceiling. null = team-configured (shape fixed by contract, value set in BOS15).
